home.title: Home
home.lead: {{tenantName}} helps people exchange skills, support, and practical help using time credits.
home.fallbackTagline: A community platform for exchanging time, skills, and support.
home.sectionBody: Members can offer help, request support, join events, share resources, and build trusted local connections.

about.title: About
about.lead: Learn how this community uses time credits to recognise everyone's contribution.
about.body: Project NEXUS supports multi-tenant timebanking communities with public information pages and private member tools.

help.title: Help
help.lead: Find support for joining, taking part, and using your community account.
help.body: For account-specific help, contact the community team or sign in to the member app.

contact.title: Contact
contact.lead: Get in touch with the community team.
contact.body: Use the published contact details for this community, or return to the member app if you already have an account.

faq.title: FAQ
faq.lead: Common questions about timebanking and community participation.
faq.body: Timebanking lets people exchange support using time as the unit of value. One hour given earns one time credit.

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.lead: Privacy information for public visitors and community members.
privacy.body: This public page is prepared for tenant-managed privacy content. Member-specific privacy controls remain inside the secure app.

terms.title: Terms
terms.lead: Terms and participation information for this community.
terms.body: This public page is prepared for tenant-managed terms content. Community administrators can publish fuller CMS content through the platform.

accessibility.title: Accessibility
accessibility.lead: Accessibility information for Project NEXUS public pages.
accessibility.body: Project NEXUS provides a modern React member app and a separate accessible frontend track for users who prefer a highly accessible HTML-first experience.

blog.title: Blog
blog.lead: News and updates from this community.
blog.empty: No public posts are available yet.

blogDetail.title: Blog post
blogDetail.missing: This public post is not available in the shadow frontend yet.

cmsPage.title: Page
cmsPage.missing: This public page is not available in the shadow frontend yet.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.lead: This route is not owned by the shadow public frontend.

footer.attribution: Project NEXUS is free software licensed under AGPL-3.0-or-later.
